value.name: AI Relationship Health Platform
value.description: AI-powered platform centered on a 7-minute assessment, mapping relationships across seven dimensions, identifying bottlenecks, prescribing actions, and matching couples with professional support.

value.name: AI-based English learning tool
value.description: Developed for a California charter school, serving over 14,000 students.

value.name: AI tutor
value.description: Adapts to each student's learning pace and answers questions in real time, part of a unified platform with multiple AI capabilities for student outcomes and staff productivity.

value.name: Compliance agents
value.description: Autonomous agents that review attendance, generate PDFs, and route documents for signature.

value.name: AI-Enhanced Premium Vacation Rental Platform
value.description: AI powers operations and guest experience for a platform with over 1,000 properties in 80+ destinations.

value.name: Operational Analytics for an Enterprise Client
value.description: Operational analytics agent pulling data from client systems, identifying trends and anomalies, and surfacing actionable insights in near real-time.
